name: Legacy Pro & V2 Dosing Tool
summary: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 dosing tool is designed for precise, clean and efficient chamber loading.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro & V2 dosing tool is designed for precise, clean and efficient chamber loading. It helps you handle material with accuracy for smoother, more consistent sessions. Compact and easy to carry, this tool reduces mess while keeping your setup organised. Ideal for both home use and on-the-go preparation. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
